{{Quote|It's settled, then. Let this be an official Declaration of Rebellion. Today we vow to overturn the Empire in order that the galaxy and all its peoples will be one day free, be they human or Hamadryas, Wookiee, or Weequay.|[[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]]|<ref name="TFUn">[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed'' novelization]]</ref>}}
The '''Hamadryas''' were a [[Primate/Legends|simian]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] species<ref name="KOTOR CG" /> with green skin and ape-like snouts.<ref name="Cebann Veekan">{{DB|character|cebannveekan|Veekan, Cebann}}</ref> They seemed to not possess the need to blink, and the species lacked a true carotid artery.<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

The holoperformer [[Cebann Veekan]] was a notable member of this species.<ref name="Cebann Veekan" /> [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Haydel Goravvus]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]/Hamadryas hybrid.<ref name="KOTOR CG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The name of this species was created by [[Bob Vitas]] as part of the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' campaign on [[StarWars.com]].<ref name="Cebann Veekan" />

The species was named after the [[Wikipedia:Hamadryas Baboon|Hamadryas baboon]].<ref name="Hamadryas Backstory">{{Blog|swenc|42|Hamadryas Backstory}}</ref>

As revealed in his [[Star Wars Blog]], Bob Vitas intended that the Hamadryas species to be from a planet called "Papio".<ref name="Hamadryas Backstory" />
